info.title: HMPPS Prisoner Property API
info.description: API for viewing and managing prisoner's properties and its locations

tags.name: hmpps-queue-resource-async
tags.description: Endpoints that are to be used by administrators only for managing SQS queues. All endpoints require the QUEUE_ADMIN role further information can be found in the hmpps-spring-boot-sqs project

put.summary: Update a property storage location's name and/or capacity

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__LOCATION_ADMIN role is required

409.description: A storage location with this name already exists in the prison

delete.summary: Remove a location as a place property can be stored
delete.description: Drops the location's property designation. Rejected if the location still holds any container. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__LOCATION_ADMIN.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__LOCATION_ADMIN role is required

409.description: The location still holds containers and cannot be removed

get.summary: Get a single property container by its id

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

put.description: Replaces the container's mutable details (type, seal, location, proposed disposal date), recording any change in history. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW role is required

put.summary: Switch the property service on or off for an agency
put.description: Activates or deactivates the property service for the given agency (prison). Idempotent. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__ADMIN.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__ADMIN role is required

post.summary: Create or update a property container from a NOMIS change
post.description: Used by the NOMIS sync to keep DPS in step with ongoing NOMIS changes. Supply the DPS id to update an existing container, or omit it to create a new one. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__SYNC. Re-sending an unchanged snapshot makes no change.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__SYNC role is required

404.description: The supplied DPS id does not exist

post.summary: Migrate a property container from NOMIS
post.description: Used by the initial bulk migration from NOMIS. Behaves like upsert but raises no domain event, as migrated data is a one-off load that downstream systems do not need to be notified of. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__SYNC.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__SYNC role is required

404.description: The supplied DPS id does not exist

get.summary: List the property storage locations for a prison
get.description: Every property storage location in the prison (including full ones), each with its capacity and how many containers it currently holds, for the management screens. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__LOCATION_ADMIN.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__LOCATION_ADMIN role is required

post.summary: Add a new property storage location to a prison
post.description: Creates a top-level storage location with a generated code and the given capacity. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__LOCATION_ADMIN.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__LOCATION_ADMIN role is required

409.description: A storage location with this name already exists in the prison

post.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW. If `previousSealNumber` matches a container the prisoner has due for transfer out at another prison, that container is reconciled as the property arriving here on transfer: it is linked to the new record and deactivated (transferred).

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW role is required

409.description: The seal number is already in use by another active container

post.summary: Remove a property container from active storage
post.description: Records why the container is leaving the sending prison's active storage: RETURNED to the prisoner, DISPOSED of, or CREATED_IN_ERROR (all terminal, clearing its location and freeing its seal), or TRANSFERRED - which instead reassigns the container to the receiving prison (toPrisonId), keeping it active there. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW role is required

409.description: Property container has already left active storage

post.description: Moves the container to an internal prison location or offsite to the Branston warehouse, recording the move in history. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW.

200.description: Property container moved (or already at the target location)

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW role is required

409.description: Property container has already left active storage

post.description: Records the container as disposed of (destroyed), taking it out of active storage and clearing its location. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW role is required

409.description: Property container has already left active storage

post.summary: Combine containers into a new sealed container
post.description: Combines the property of two or more source containers into a single new sealed container. The sources must share one prisoner and prison (inherited by the new container) and are taken out of active storage (COMBINED). Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW.

400.description: Invalid request (mismatched or removed sources, fewer than two)

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RW role is required

404.description: A source container was not found

409.description: The seal number is already in use by another active container

get.summary: Get a synced property container by its DPS id, for reconciliation

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__SYNC role is required

get.summary: Get a property container's history (its events), newest first
get.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO. Returns the ordered list of events that make up the container's history (created, sealed, moved, transferred, returned, disposed, combined, etc.), newest first. Each event carries only the fields relevant to it (e.g. seal number for seal events, from/to location for moves, from/to prison for transfers, related container for combines).

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

get.summary: Get the property containers held for a prisoner
get.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO. Returns an empty list if the prisoner has no property containers. Each container is enriched with the prisoner name (prisoner-search), the name of the prison holding it (prison-register) and a description of its current location (locations-inside-prison-api), and flags whether it is held in the prisoner's current prison. Results can be filtered by status and sorted by when each container was last updated.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Only return containers with one of these statuses. Repeatable; omit for all statuses.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

get.summary: Get a prisoner's property summary counts for the profile tile
get.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO. Returns just the totals a prisoner-profile "Property containers" tile needs, over the person's active (not removed) containers: how many are held at their current establishment (from prisoner-search) versus other establishments, how many are due to be transferred in or out, and how many are overdue for disposal or return - plus whether they have ever had any property recorded. The current establishment (and its name) is null when the prisoner is released or in transit.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

get.summary: Get a prisoner's whole-property history timeline, newest first
get.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO. Returns a single interleaved timeline of every event across all of the prisoner's (non-archived) containers, newest first, plus a de-duplicated "arrived at ..." item for each prison the prisoner moved into. Prison and location ids are resolved to names, and each container event carries the seal number and acting establishment as at that point in its history. Returns an empty list if the prisoner has no property.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

get.summary: Get the property containers held in a prison, paged and grouped by prisoner
get.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO. Returns the establishment-wide property list as a page of prisoners (each with all their matching containers), so a prisoner's containers are never split across a page boundary - the page total is the number of matching prisoners. Each container is enriched with the prisoner name (prisoner-search), prison name (prison-register) and location description (locations-inside-prison-api). Optionally filtered by a free-text query (prisoner number, seal number or storage location), prisoner number, seal number, container type(s), status and storage location. With no status filter, containers that have left active storage (disposed, returned, transferred, combined) are hidden; pass a status filter, or includeRemoved=true to also surface returned/disposed containers. Set dueForTransferIn=true to additionally surface property held at another prison that is due to be transferred in to this establishment (its owner was received here). Use the standard page, size and sort query parameters for pagination.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search matched against prisoner number, seal number or storage location

parameters.name: prisonerNumber
parameters.description: Filter to a single prisoner number

parameters.name: sealNumber
parameters.description: Filter to a single seal number

parameters.name: containerType
parameters.description: Filter to these container types (repeatable). Omit for all types.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter to these statuses (repeatable). Omit to hide containers that have left active storage.

parameters.name: storageLocation
parameters.description: Filter to a storage location code (e.g. PB5638), or BRANSTON for offsite storage

parameters.name: includeRemoved
parameters.description: Also include containers that have been returned or disposed of

parameters.name: personLocation
parameters.description: Filter by where the property's owner currently is: IN_ESTABLISHMENT (people held here) or LEFT_ESTABLISHMENT (people no longer here). Resolved from prisoner-search.

parameters.name: dueForTransferIn
parameters.description: Also include property held at another prison that is due to be transferred in to this establishment (its owner was received here). Additive to the held-here list; when it is the only status selection, only incoming property is returned.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

200.description: Page of prisoners with their property containers returned

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

get.summary: Get the whole-prison property summary counts for a prison
get.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO. Returns the establishment summary tiles for the prison as a whole, independent of any list paging or filtering: the remaining storage spaces across the prison's property locations (from locations-inside-prison-api) and how many containers are stored on-site, due to transfer out, due to be returned and due to be disposed.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

get.summary: Get the property storage locations in a prison that have space, with capacity and container counts
get.description: Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO. Returns a page of the prison's property storage locations (from locations-inside-prison-api - any location with a PROPERTY usage, not only BOX-typed ones) that still have room, annotated with their capacity, how many property containers are currently held there and the remaining available spaces, so a user can pick somewhere to store property. Locations with no remaining space are excluded. Optionally filtered by a search query matched (case-insensitively) against the location code, local name and path hierarchy - the query supports * (any run of characters) and ? (a single character) wildcards, and a query with no wildcards is a substring match. Ordered alphabetically by name by default, or most-available-first with sort=MOST_AVAILABLE. Use the standard page and size query parameters for pagination.

schema.description: How to order the storage locations returned for a prison

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Filter to boxes whose code, name or path matches this term (supports * and ? wildcards)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__RO role is required

get.summary: List the agencies the property service is switched on for
get.description: Returns the ids of the active agencies (prisons). The same list is published under /info as "activeAgencies". Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__ADMIN.

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__ADMIN role is required

get.summary: List all prisons with whether the property service is switched on for each
get.description: Returns every prison (from prison-register) with an `active` flag, for the rollout admin console. Requires role ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__ADMIN.

200.description: Prisons with their active state returned

401.description: Unauthorized - a valid token was not presented

403.description: Forbidden - the ROLE_PRISONER_PROPERTY__ADMIN role is required

UpdatePropertyLocationRequest.description: Request to update a property storage location's name and/or capacity

localName.description: New name to display for the location

capacity.description: New number of property containers this location can hold

PropertyLocationAdminDto.description: A property storage location for the management screens, with its capacity and how full it is

name.description: Name to display for the location

capacity.description: How many property containers this location can hold

containersHeld.description: How many containers are currently held here

availableSpaces.description: How many more containers can be stored here (capacity minus held, never below zero)

UpdatePropertyContainerRequest.description: Updated details for a property container

internalLocationId.description: Internal storage location id (locations-inside-prison-api), if known

proposedDisposalDate.description: Date the container is proposed to be disposed of, if any

PropertyContainerDto.description: A sealed container of a prisoner's property

prisonerNumber.description: Prisoner number the property belongs to

prisonId.description: Id of the prison holding the container

currentSealNumber.description: Current seal number, derived from the most recent seal event

currentStatus.description: Current status, derived from the most recent event

currentLocation.description: Current internal location id, derived from the most recent move. Null when offsite at Branston, unrecorded, or disposed

currentLocationType.description: Current storage location type (INTERNAL prison location or offsite BRANSTON), derived from the most recent move

proposedDisposalDate.description: Date the container is proposed to be disposed of, if any

removalOutcome.description: Why the container left active storage (disposed, returned, transferred, combined), if it has

removalDate.description: Date the container left active storage, if it has

createdByUserId.description: Id of the user who created the container

archived.description: Whether the container is archived (hidden from normal reads, e.g. NOMIS inactive containers)

SetActiveAgencyRequest.description: Switch the property service on or off for an agency (prison)

active.description: Whether the property service should be active for this agency

AgencyStatusDto.description: A prison (agency) and whether the property service is switched on for it

active.description: Whether the property service is active for this agency

SyncPropertyContainerRequest.description: A NOMIS property container snapshot to migrate or sync into DPS

dpsId.description: Existing DPS container id. Null when creating/migrating a new container; supplied on update.

prisonerNumber.description: Prisoner (NOMS) number, resolved by the caller from OFFENDER_BOOK_ID

prisonId.description: NOMIS AGY_LOC_ID - establishment holding the container

internalLocationId.description: DPS locations-inside-prison-api location UUID for NOMIS INTERNAL_LOCATION_ID, resolved by the caller. Null if NOMIS had no location, or for 'Branston Storage' containers which are held offsite with no internal location.

sealMark.description: NOMIS SEAL_MARK (free text, may be null or blank)

expiryDate.description: NOMIS EXPIRY_DATE - the date the container became inactive. Used as the disposal/removal date only when the container is inactive (active=false); it may be a future planned date while still active, in which case it does not dispose the container.

active.description: NOMIS ACTIVE_FLAG. False (inactive) means the container has left storage and is recorded as disposed (dated by EXPIRY_DATE); it remains visible with a disposed status.

SyncPropertyContainerResponse.description: The result of a property container sync/migrate upsert

dpsId.description: The DPS container id - newly minted when CREATED, the existing id when UPDATED

nomisPropertyContainerId.description: The NOMIS PROPERTY_CONTAINER_ID, echoed back so the caller can persist the mapping

mappingType.description: Whether a new DPS container was created or an existing one updated

CreatePropertyLocationRequest.description: Request to create a new property storage location for a prison

localName.description: Name to display for the location

capacity.description: How many property containers this location can hold

CreatePropertyContainerRequest.description: Details for a new sealed property container

prisonerNumber.description: Prisoner (NOMS) number the property belongs to

prisonId.description: Id of the prison holding the container

previousSealNumber.description: If this container is arriving on transfer from another establishment, the seal it was recorded under there (its 'due for transfer out' seal). Used to link to and deactivate that record so no ghost record is left behind. Leave blank for genuinely new property.

internalLocationId.description: Internal storage location id (locations-inside-prison-api), if known

proposedDisposalDate.description: Date the container is proposed to be disposed of, if any

RemoveContainerRequest.description: Details for removing a property container from active storage: returned to the prisoner, disposed of, transferred to the prisoner's new establishment, or the record was created in error

outcome.description: Why the container is being removed - one of RETURNED, DISPOSED, TRANSFERRED or CREATED_IN_ERROR (COMBINED is not accepted; use the combine endpoint)

date.description: Date the container was removed; defaults to today when omitted

toPrisonId.description: Receiving prison id - required when the outcome is TRANSFERRED; the container is reassigned to this prison

MoveContainerRequest.description: Details for moving a property container

locationType.description: Where the container is being moved to - an INTERNAL prison location or the offsite BRANSTON warehouse

internalLocationId.description: Internal storage location id (locations-inside-prison-api) - required for an INTERNAL move, omitted for BRANSTON

DisposeContainerRequest.description: Details for disposing of a property container

disposalDate.description: Date the container was disposed of; defaults to today when omitted

CombineContainersRequest.description: Details for combining containers into a new sealed container

sourceContainerIds.description: Ids of the source containers to combine (at least two)

sealNumber.description: Seal number for the new container

internalLocationId.description: Internal storage location id of the new container (locations-inside-prison-api), if held internally

locationType.description: Storage location type of the new container; defaults to INTERNAL when an internal location id is given

PropertyEventDto.description: A single event in a property container's history

eventUserId.description: Id of the user who recorded the event

sealNumber.description: Seal number recorded by this event, for events that carry a seal

fromInternalLocationId.description: Internal location the container moved from, for move events

toInternalLocationId.description: Internal location the container moved to, for move events

toStorageLocationType.description: Storage location type the container moved to (INTERNAL prison location or offsite BRANSTON), for move events

fromPrisonId.description: Prison the container moved from, for transfer events

fromPrisonName.description: Name of the prison the container moved from, for transfer events

toPrisonId.description: Prison the container moved to, for transfer events

toPrisonName.description: Name of the prison the container moved to, for transfer events

containerType.description: The container's type as at the time of this event (snapshotted for the durable history)

eventDate.description: Business date the event relates to (e.g. proposed disposal or removal date), if any

relatedContainerId.description: Id of a related container, for combine events

PrisonerPropertyContainerDto.description: A sealed container of a prisoner's property, enriched with the prisoner, prison and location names resolved from prisoner-search, prison-register and locations-inside-prison-api.

prisonerNumber.description: Prisoner number the property belongs to

prisonerName.description: Name of the prisoner the property belongs to, from prisoner-search. Null if the prisoner could not be resolved

prisonId.description: Id of the prison holding the container

prisonName.description: Name of the prison holding the container, from prison-register. Null if the prison could not be resolved

prisonerCurrentPrisonId.description: Id of the prisoner's current prison, from prisoner-search. Distinct from the holding prison; null if the prisoner could not be resolved

prisonerCurrentPrisonName.description: Name of the prisoner's current prison, from prison-register. Distinct from the holding prison; null if it could not be resolved

prisonerMovementStatus.description: The prisoner's movement status, from prisoner-search: whether they are held in an establishment, in transit between prisons, or released. Null if the prisoner could not be resolved

inPrisonersCurrentPrison.description: Whether the container is currently held in the prisoner's current prison. False flags property left behind at a prison the prisoner has moved on from

currentSealNumber.description: Current seal number, derived from the most recent seal event

currentStatus.description: Current status, derived from the most recent event

currentLocation.description: Current internal location id, derived from the most recent move. Null when offsite at Branston, unrecorded, or disposed

currentLocationType.description: Current storage location type (INTERNAL prison location or offsite BRANSTON), derived from the most recent move

locationDescription.description: Human-friendly description of the current internal location, from locations-inside-prison-api. Null when offsite, unrecorded, disposed, or the location could not be resolved

proposedDisposalDate.description: Date the container is proposed to be disposed of, if any

removalOutcome.description: Why the container left active storage (disposed, returned, transferred, combined), if it has

removalDate.description: Date the container left active storage, if it has

createdByUserId.description: Id of the user who created the container

archived.description: Whether the container is archived (hidden from normal reads, e.g. NOMIS inactive containers)

PrisonerPropertySummaryDto.description: A single prisoner's property totals for the profile "Property containers" tile. All counts are for the person's active (not removed) containers, split by where they are held relative to the prisoner's current establishment (resolved from prisoner-search). Carries everything the candidate tile designs need so the profile can render either the simple two-count layout or the fuller breakdown.

currentEstablishmentId.description: The prisoner's current establishment id (prisoner-search), or null if they are released or in transit

currentEstablishmentName.description: The prisoner's current establishment name (prison-register), or null if unknown/released/in transit

heldInCurrentEstablishment.description: Active containers physically held at the prisoner's current establishment

heldInOtherEstablishments.description: Active containers held at any other establishment

dueForTransferIn.description: Active containers held elsewhere that are due to be transferred in to the current establishment (their owner was received here). A subset of those held in other establishments.

dueForTransferOut.description: Active containers held at the current establishment that are due to be transferred out (status DUE_FOR_TRANSFER_OUT)

overdueForDisposal.description: Active containers whose proposed disposal date has arisen (today or earlier)

overdueForReturn.description: Active containers flagged due for return following the prisoner's release (status DUE_FOR_RETURN)

hasEverHadProperty.description: Whether the prisoner has any recorded property at all (including containers that have since been returned, disposed or transferred). Lets the tile distinguish "never had property" from "no longer has any".

PrisonerTimelineItemDto.description: A single item in a prisoner's whole-property history timeline

itemType.description: Whether the item is a container event or a prisoner movement

movementKind.description: For a prisoner movement, whether it was an initial admission or a transfer in; null otherwise

propertySystem.description: For a prisoner movement, whether the receiving establishment was managing property in DPS or NOMIS at that date; null otherwise

eventType.description: What happened to the container, for container events; null for prisoner movements

eventStatus.description: The status this event put the container into (used for the item's status tag); null for prisoner movements

eventDate.description: Business date the event relates to (e.g. proposed disposal date), if any

eventUserId.description: Id of the user who recorded the event

systemGenerated.description: Whether the event was generated by the system rather than a user

prisonerName.description: Name of the prisoner, for prisoner movement items; null for container events

actingEstablishmentName.description: Name of the establishment that performed the action (for the byline); the destination prison for a movement

fromPrisonName.description: Name of the prison the container moved from, for transfer/disposal/return events

toPrisonName.description: Name of the prison the container moved to, for transfer/received events (and the arrival prison for a movement)

toStorageLocationType.description: Storage location type the container moved to (INTERNAL or offsite BRANSTON), for move events

sealNumber.description: The container's seal number as at the time of this event

relatedContainerId.description: Id of a related container, for combine events

containerId.description: Id of the container this event belongs to; null for prisoner movements

containerType.description: Type of the container, for the item's expandable details; null for prisoner movements

containerSealNumber.description: The container's current seal number, for the item's expandable details

containerStatus.description: The container's current status, for the item's expandable details

containerLocationDescription.description: Human-friendly description of the container's current location, for the item's expandable details

PrisonerPropertyGroupDto.description: The property containers held in an establishment for a single prisoner, grouped together for the establishment-wide list. Carries the prisoner's identity and current establishment (from prisoner-search) for the row header, with one entry per matching container.

prisonerNumber.description: Prisoner number the containers belong to

prisonerName.description: Name of the prisoner, from prisoner-search. Null if the prisoner could not be resolved

prisonerCurrentPrisonId.description: Id of the prisoner's current establishment, from prisoner-search. May differ from the establishment holding the property, or be null if the prisoner is not currently in an establishment

prisonerCurrentPrisonName.description: Name of the prisoner's current establishment, from prison-register. Null if it could not be resolved

prisonerMovementStatus.description: The prisoner's movement status, from prisoner-search: whether they are held in an establishment, in transit between prisons, or released. Null if the prisoner could not be resolved

containers.description: The matching property containers held for this prisoner in the establishment

PrisonPropertySummaryDto.description: Whole-prison property totals for the establishment summary tiles. Counts are for the prison as a whole, independent of any list paging or filtering.

availableStorageSpaces.description: Remaining spaces for property across the prison's storage locations - the sum over each location of its capacity minus the containers it holds (floored at 0)

storedOnSite.description: Number of containers currently in internal storage at this establishment

dueToTransferOut.description: Number of containers held here for people no longer at this establishment (status DUE_FOR_TRANSFER_OUT)

dueToBeReturned.description: Number of containers due to be returned (flagged after the prisoner's release)

dueToBeDisposed.description: Number of containers whose proposed disposal date has arisen (today or earlier)

BoxLocationDto.description: A property storage location within a prison, its capacity and how many containers it currently holds

prisonId.description: Id of the prison the location is in

localName.description: Local (display) name of the location, if set

pathHierarchy.description: Full path of the location within the prison

name.description: Human-friendly name, preferring the local name and falling back to the path hierarchy

containerCount.description: Number of property containers currently held in this location

capacity.description: How many property containers this location can hold (capacity of its PROPERTY usage)

availableSpaces.description: Remaining spaces for property containers (capacity minus the containers currently held)
